artPrompt: A dramatic moment as a single spinning coin hangs at the apex of its toss high above the feral town square, glowing white-hot and trailing sparks, while below a grinning goblin braces both arms for the inevitable blast and a crackling bolt begins to gather around the coin. Bonfire light and confetti fill the night. Mono-red palette of flame orange, ember red, and black smoke, gambling-fueled violence, composed wide in a 4:3 landscape frame, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: Heads I Win
text: Flip a coin. If you win the flip, Heads I Win deals 4 damage to any target. If you lose the flip, it deals 2 damage to any target instead.
flavorText: Tails you also lose, just a little less.
